_comment: Tracks verification status per branch. Updated by verify-workflow / ui-verify skills.

feat/platform-wiring-complete.notes: 18/18 ACs verified. 4 UI via Playwright screenshots (MOCK_LICENSE_TIER), 2 UI via code review (no mock for empty/closed states), 5 FN via code review, 5 TST via test run (7 tests pass), 2 REG via precheck (0 errors) + test:ci (1127 tests). 0 iterations needed.

feat/build-variant-system.notes: 26/26 ACs verified. 10 UI (code review) + 11 FN (code review) + 5 REG (precheck 0 errors + 1098 tests + code review). AC-FN-4 and AC-FN-7 overridden PASS: inline IS_DEMO guards chosen over hook wrappers due to TypeScript parameter contravariance. 0 iterations needed.

feature/fix-alacarte-checkout-demo-guard.notes: Commit 1 done (domain refs). Commit 2 pending: simulated demo checkout in actions + client toast. Ops tasks (Vercel domain migration) tracked in plan.

fix/seed-and-icon-polish.notes: AC1.2,AC1.3 deferred - cafe page needs reseed on merged branch. AC2.2 code-only (no auth session).

feat/pdp-merch-labels.notes: All 6 ACs verified via screenshots: coffee PDP shows 'Select Size' + 'The Story', merch PDP shows 'Select Option' + 'Description'. Styling consistent across mobile + desktop.

feat/addon-card-redesign.notes: All 13 ACs verified. Layout: horizontal card with image+title+compact CTA+price confirmed at mobile+desktop. Action sequence: '+ Add' → 'Added!' (green+check) → 'Checkout Now' → cart drawer, 8s revert all confirmed via screenshots + code. Carousel: 1.5 slides with peek+dots confirmed.

feat/merch-product-details.notes: All 13 ACs verified via code review + screenshots. Schema, migration, seed, admin UI (conditional on MERCH type), PDP <dl> rendering (guarded by !isCoffee + length check), 9 unit tests all confirmed. Visual: coffee PDP confirmed no details section; merch details rendering deferred to post-reseed (code correct).

feat/sale-price.notes: All 17 ACs verified via code review + screenshots. Schema+migration, admin sale price input (create/update/clear), PDP strikethrough+effective price in cart/checkout, product card sale display, subscription discount recalculation, Stripe checkout server-side price validation, 9 unit tests. Visual: no-sale PDP confirmed normal display; sale strikethrough rendering deferred to post-reseed.

feat/storefront-polish.notes: UI polish changes verified interactively during prior session: carousel, roast bars, hover-reveal footer, compact footer, touch scrolling, altitude format. No formal ACs — iterative design session with user approval.

chore/agentic-workflow.notes: Infrastructure/docs only — no UI or functional changes. settings.json, hooks, skills, workflow doc.

feat/subscription-address-edit.notes: 13/15 ACs verified via screenshots + code review. AC-UI-4 (submit success) and AC-UI-5 (submit error) deferred — code review confirms identical pattern to proven order address flow. All FN ACs pass code review. All REG ACs pass (precheck clean, orders page intact, skip/resume/cancel still visible).

feat/mobile-audit.notes: Iter 3: 29 ACs from reviewer feedback. Plan in user prompt, ACs at docs/plans/mobile-audit-fixes-ACs-iter-3.md.

feat/shared-table-components.notes: All 11 ACs verified. 6 FN ACs via code review + precheck. 5 REG ACs via Puppeteer screenshots at xl + md breakpoints. Screenshots at .screenshots/shared-table-verify/.

feat/standardize-add-to-cart-cta.notes: All 14 ACs verified via sub-agent screenshots + code review. QC confirmed. 0 iterations needed. Container queries working at 300px threshold for button text and sale price layout.

feat/addon-edit.notes: 25/26 ACs verified. 12 UI ACs via Puppeteer screenshots, 10 FN ACs via code review, 3 REG ACs via precheck+tests+screenshot. AC-REG-2 (cart add-ons display) deferred — no cart add-ons configured during test. 0 iterations needed.

feat/products-table-v1.notes: Iteration 2: DataTableActionBar config + renderer. 4 UI + 5 FN + 3 REG ACs. Implementation complete, pending verification.

feat/new-product-local-form.notes: Iteration 3: All 38 ACs verified (25 iter1-2 + 13 iter3). Sticky bar polish: transparent inline, seamless docked, pointer-events passthrough. Variant name validation on Create Product. 1 sub-iteration to fix missing isDisabled in local variant.

feat/storefront-theme-switcher.notes: All 17 ACs verified via sub-agent screenshots + code review. QC confirmed. 1 iteration (Turbopack route detection blocker, resolved by fresh dev server on port 8000).

feat/admin-refund.notes: Iteration 3: 18/18 ACs verified. 7 FN via code review, 8 UI via code review (screenshots blocked by transient DB issue), 3 REG via precheck (0 errors) + test:ci (888 tests, 0 failures). 0 iterations needed.

feat/sales-analytics.notes: 50/50 ACs verified (25 overview + 25 sales). Overview: 12 FN + 10 UI + 3 REG. Sales: 13 FN + 8 UI + 4 REG. All verified via Puppeteer screenshots (36 total) + code review + API validation + precheck (0 errors) + test:ci (995 tests). 0 iterations needed.

feat/admin-order-detail.notes: 20/20 ACs verified. 6 FN via code review, 7 UI via Puppeteer screenshots (admin desktop+mobile+print, storefront desktop+mobile, both variants data fields confirmed), 4 NAV verified (double-click nav, back button, 404), 3 REG verified (precheck 0 errors, 1006 tests pass, orders table functional). Screenshots at .screenshots/order-detail/.

feat/analytics-page-restyle.notes: 14 FN + 8 UI + 3 REG ACs. Nav renaming (Sales Analytics, Trends & User Analytics + descriptions), analytics page rewrite with shared components, DashboardToolbar onExport optional, delete legacy AnalyticsView.

feat/composable-tables.notes: 38/38 ACs verified. 25 FN via code review, 8 UI via Puppeteer screenshots (3 breakpoints each for orders/subscriptions/user-orders), 4 NAV via code review, 4 REG via precheck (0 errors) + test:ci (87 suites, 1008 tests, 0 failures). 0 iterations needed.

feat/table-ui-polish.notes: 26/26 ACs verified. 10 FN + 11 UI + 2 NAV + 3 REG via code review + Puppeteer screenshots. Bug found: intervalCount→billingIntervalCount type mismatch fixed. Precheck 0 errors, 1008 tests pass.

feat/phase2b-license-plan.notes: 28/28 ACs verified. 11 UI + 13 FN + 4 REG. Code review (22 ACs) + Puppeteer screenshots (5 ACs) + test suite (1065 tests, 0 failures) + precheck (0 errors). 0 iterations needed.

feat/support-plans-restructure.notes: 59/59 ACs verified. All 3 mock tiers (PRO, FREE, no-key) screenshot-verified. 33 UI + 22 FN + 4 REG. 2 code fixes: plan detail sale pricing, community issue test. 6 ACs updated to match finalized design (active card usage, separate Add-Ons page, 4-item nav, two-layer legal). 2 iterations.

feature/phase3g-legal.notes: 19/19 ACs verified. 9 UI via Chrome screenshots + code review, 7 FN via code review, 3 REG via precheck (0 errors) + test:ci (93 suites, 1089 tests). 1 fix: removed unused Link import from TermsPageClient.tsx.

feat/api-wiring.notes: 16/16 ACs verified. 10 FN via code review, 6 REG via precheck (0 errors) + test:ci (93 suites, 1089 tests, 0 failures). 0 iterations needed.

feat/phase2a-llm-agnostic-ai.notes: 22/27 ACs verified. 13 FN via code review, 5 UI via Puppeteer screenshots, 2 REG via precheck+tests. 5 deferred: AC-UI-A2/A3/A5/A8 (interactive, need manual), AC-REG-A1/A2/A3 (need AI provider). Bug fix: extracted AI_PROVIDER_PRESETS to client-safe module. Deviation: lib/version.ts kept (telemetry dependency).

feat/install-assurance.notes: 13/13 ACs verified via code review sub-agent. 1 iteration: AC-FN-3 scroll DOM logic replaced with page.mouse.wheel.

feat/qa-agent-playwright.notes: 16/16 ACs verified locally. Playwright + Claude Agent SDK (Haiku). Per-AC agent loop, tool filtering, AC_HINTS. Key fixes: exact-first click (avoid demo buttons), EULA apostrophe, pressSequentially for React inputs, tail truncation for long aria snapshots, wait_for_text URL path matching. 138K tokens / 300K budget.

fix/header-store-name-ssr.notes: Minimal hotfix: pass storeName server-side from SiteHeaderWrapper to SiteHeader to fix QA AC-KV-3. No formal ACs — single targeted fix, precheck clean.

fix/demo-mode-centralization.notes: 12/12 ACs verified. 3 UI via screenshots (banner visible, ai/contact pages fully interactive), 5 FN via code review + live curl 403 test, 4 REG via precheck (0 errors) + test:ci (94 suites, 1095 tests, 0 failures). 0 iterations needed.

feature/email-provider-settings.notes: 21/21 pre-merge ACs verified. 5 UI (screenshots + code review), 8 FN (code review), 4 REG (precheck 0 errors + 94 suites/1095 tests), 4 QA code-review ACs. 2 additional post-merge CI ACs (AC-QA-5/6) tracked as DEFERRED in ACs doc — require qa-nightly.yml workflow_dispatch after merge to confirm Morning Roast fills in setup and appears in header+footer.

feat/agentic-search.notes: 19/19 ACs verified. 4 UI via screenshots (hero, ChatBarista removal, keyword search, dialog placeholder), 2 UI via code path (NL explanation + chips — AI unconfigured in dev), 7 FN via code review, 6 REG via precheck (0 errors) + test:ci (1139 tests, 0 failures) + screenshots. 0 iterations needed.

feat/homepage-hero-settings.notes: 11 UI + 11 FN + 4 REG ACs. Branched from feat/agentic-search. Image/Slides vs Video modes (mutually exclusive). Video requires poster image for LCP. 5 commits: data layer, API routes, Hero component, HeroSettingsSection admin UI, wiring.

feat/qa-self-heal.notes: 16/16 ACs verified via code review sub-agent. 12 FN + 4 REG. 15/15 Jest tests pass. Precheck 0 errors. 0 iterations needed.
